input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A rolling cutter slices a thick rectangular pizza covered in red sauce. The blade progresses from the left edge toward center squares. Hands guide the tool across the surface. A white INSIDER logo appears in the upper right corner. Yellow crust remains visible along the edges.</think><action>silent</action>

The man in the red shirt and white cap guides the tray near the opening while wearing a mitt, and the man in the black shirt supports the handle's far end.</think><action>silent</action>

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A rolling cutter slices a thick rectangular pizza covered in red sauce, guided by hands to form a grid. The scene shifts to a ladle pouring thick red sauce onto a white rectangular dough base. [4-8] A person in a white apron spreads the sauce over the dough on a wooden table, with a metal rack and plastic container nearby. The sauce eventually covers the entire surface. [8-12] The pizza is shown topped with red sauce and generously sprinkled with white granules, with the cut grid visible beneath. [12-14] A slice is pulled away, exposing the thick, porous golden crust interior. The video ends with an extreme close-up of the red sauce and white seasoning. The "INSIDER" logo appears in the upper right corner throughout.

[14-16] "TOMATO PIE" text overlays a top-down view of a rectangular pizza with red sauce and white granules, next to containers of cheese and herbs. [16-18] A woman with long dark hair bites a slice, holding a paper plate, with red boxes and the "INSIDER" logo visible. [18-20] Customers wait at a shop counter decorated with green garlands, near shelves of packaged goods. [20-22] A man in a plaid shirt and cap is interviewed against a brick wall, with the "INSIDER" logo present. [22-26] Aerial views capture a city skyline and brick neighborhoods before the camera blurs from rapid movement. [26-28] A woman in a beige trench coat stands on a sidewalk, labeled "Taryn Varricchio Producer" via a green graphic.

[28-32] A woman with long dark hair, identified by a green overlay as "Taryn Varricchio Producer," stands on a sidewalk wearing a beige trench coat and patterned scarf. She gestures then clasps her hands before a red brick row house. [30-34] The view shifts to a red brick building with a white sign reading "Sarcone's Bakery" and a neon window sign, followed by a close-up of the hanging "Sarcone's BAKERY" sign with bold black text against a white sky. [34-38] Taryn returns, gesturing with open hands then clasping them near a white garage door and a planter with red berries, with the "INSIDER" logo visible. [38-42] Inside, a person in a white apron uses a rolling cutter to grid-cut a large rectangular pizza topped with red sauce on a wooden surface. Finally, a woman in a grey hoodie uses white paper to lift a square slice from a tray among several trays.

[44-48] A woman in a grey hoodie stands behind a counter, using white paper to lift a square slice of red-sauced pizza from a metal tray. She adjusts the slice with both hands while several other trays of sliced pizza sit on the counter. [48-52] The scene shifts to a woman with long dark hair in a beige trench coat and patterned scarf walking along a sidewalk past brick row houses. White garage doors and flower planters line the facade behind her as the "INSIDER" logo remains visible. [52-56] A Yelp review for Sarcone's Bakery displays over red pizza sauce. A red highlight box emphasizes "If you are coming to Philly and have never had tomato pie, you need to go." The Yelp and Insider logos are visible in the corners.

A static shot displays a Yelp review overlay on red sauce, with the Yelp logo in the top left and the "INSIDER" logo in the top right. A man wearing a red long-sleeved shirt, white apron, and white cap handles a large rectangular sheet of pale, porous dough, placing and smoothing it on a wooden table near a metal rack. He then touches a metal fixture on a large black oven built into a brick wall. The view cuts to the dark oven interior, where intense orange and yellow flames and glowing embers illuminate the space. Finally, two men operate a long wooden peel at a white-tiled oven; the man in red, wearing a mitt, guides the peel near the mouth while a man in a black shirt holds the far end.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>

   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.

He speaks while standing before the white-tiled oven wall, with the "INSIDER" logo visible in the upper right corner throughout the close-up.
